Name: UGameplayTagsSettings
Description:
Class for importing GameplayTags directly from a config file.
 	FGameplayTagsEditorModule::StartupModule adds this class to the Project Settings menu to be edited.
 	Editing this in Project Settings will output changes to ConfigDefaultGameplayTags.ini.
 	
 	Primary advantages of this approach are:
 	-Adding new tags doesn't require checking out external and editing file (CSV or xls) then reimporting.
 	-New tags are mergeable since .ini are text and non exclusive checkout.
 	
 	To do:
 	-Better support could be added for adding new tags. We could match existing tags and autocomplete subtags as
 	the user types (e.g, autocomplete 'Damage.Physical' as the user is adding a 'Damage.Physical.Slash' tag).

Variables.Name: ImportTagsFromConfig
Variables.Description: If true, will import tags from ini files in the configtags folder

Variables.Name: WarnOnInvalidTags
Variables.Description: If true, will give load warnings when reading invalid tags off disk

Variables.Name: InvalidTagCharacters
Variables.Description: These characters cannot be used in gameplay tags, in addition to special ones like newline

Variables.Name: FastReplication
Variables.Description: If true, will replicate gameplay tags by index instead of name. For this to work, tags must be identical on client and server

Variables.Name: GameplayTagTableList
Variables.Description: List of data tables to load tags from

Variables.Name: CommonlyReplicatedTags
Variables.Description: List of tags most frequently replicated

Variables.Name: NumBitsForContainerSize
Variables.Description: Numbers of bits to use for replicating container size, set this based on how large your containers tend to be

Variables.Name: NetIndexFirstBitSegment
Variables.Description: The length in bits of the first segment when net serializing tags. We will serialize NetIndexFirstBitSegment + 1 bit to indicate "more", which is slower to replicate
